results.label: Hangang National University - Emily Johnson
results.summary: The document is a highly professional, well-structured, and complete Certificate of Admission containing all required fields and verification features.

documentStructure.note: Standard official letter format is followed, featuring an institution letterhead, structured body, complete signature block, and official contact information.

programPeriodValidity.note: The exchange program period is logically valid, starting on September 1, 2024 and ending on June 30, 2025.

dateConsistency.note: All dates are properly formatted, chronologically consistent, and the issue date (2024-05-15) is realistic.

documentFormatting.note: The document displays highly professional design, alignment, consistent typography, and clean graphical elements.

officialSealSignature.note: Contains a clear signature of the Director of the International Office and the official Hangang National University institutional seal.

requiredFields.note: All mandatory fields including student name, ID, program dates, department, and contact details are fully present.

noFraudIndicators.note: No signs of manipulation, visual inconsistencies, impossible dates, or fraudulent domains are present.

results.label: Donggang International University - Lucas Müller
results.summary: The document successfully passes all structural, formatting, validity, and consistency checks.

documentStructure.note: The document contains a clear letterhead, structured data table, official body text, signature block, and official seal.

programPeriodValidity.note: The exchange program period (March 2, 2025 to December 19, 2025) is logically sound, with the start date preceding the end date.

dateConsistency.note: All dates are consistently formatted and valid. The issue date (2024-09-20) is reasonably set prior to the program start in 2025.

documentFormatting.note: The letter maintains a highly professional layout, consistent typography, and proper alignment.

officialSealSignature.note: The document features both a signature from Prof. Park Soo-yeon and the official stamp/seal of Donggang International University.

requiredFields.note: All necessary fields including Student Name, ID, Home University, Program Dates, Department, and Contact Location are present.

noFraudIndicators.note: No signs of fraud, spelling errors in key fields, logical date conflicts, or unprofessional language were found.

results.label: Admission Letter - James Kim (Suspicious)
results.summary: The document is invalid due to multiple severe fraud indicators, including impossible dates, inverted program dates, an astronomical scholarship amount, fake credentials, and a fake email domain.

documentStructure.note: The document follows the general structure of an official letter, including a letterhead, body, signature block, and contact information footer.

programPeriodValidity.note: The program end date (2022-12-31) is before the program start date (2023-01-01).

dateConsistency.note: The issue date '2026-15-45' is invalid (month 15 and day 45 do not exist) and is set beyond the year 2025.

documentFormatting.note: The document contains multiple spelling errors ('aprooved', 'Congratlation!') and highly unprofessional body text phrasing ('maybe in spam folder').

officialSealSignature.note: A signature and seal are physically present on the document, though the content of the seal is highly suspicious.

requiredFields.note: Key fields such as student name, ID, program dates, and contact details are present.

noFraudIndicators.note: Multiple major fraud indicators detected: impossible issue date, inverted program dates, absurdly high scholarship amount (999,999,999 KRW), joke academic credentials (Ph,D,D,D,D), and a fake email TLD (.fake).

issues: Program end date (2022-12-31) precedes the start date (2023-01-01).
Invalid issue date '2026-15-45' (invalid month/day and beyond 2025 limit).
Absurd scholarship amount of 999,999,999 KRW, which far exceeds standard limits.
Joke credentials listed for the signer: 'Ph,D,D,D,D,MBA'.
Email contact address uses a fake top-level domain: 'info@kieuniv.fake'.
Unprofessional parenthetical text in the official body: '(maybe in spam folder)'.
The official seal contains unprofessional/redundant text: 'CERTIFIED AUTHENTIC REAL UNIVERSITY'.
